title: Los presuntos
overview: Some gangsters believe they have been betrayed by Camilo, a small-time photographer, so they plan to kill him. First they send to Alexis, a murderer for hire, but his machine gun fails at the decisive moment. From that moment, Camilo and Alexis become inseparable friends.

trailers.title: TRAILER Los presuntos y Capullito de alheli
